scripts.build: turbo build --filter=clara && cp ./packages/app/src-tauri/target/release/clara.exe ./packages/app/builds && find ./packages/app/src-tauri/target/release/bundle -type f -exec cp {} ./packages/app/builds \;
scripts.clean: rm ./generated -rf && rm -rf node_modules bun.lock bun.lockb && rm -rf **/node_modules **/bun.lock **/bun.lockb && rm -rf **/dist **/build **/target && bun pm cache rm
